requirement_title: Document Type Capabilities and Command Availability

TC-S5-012-01.description: Select JPG document, verify Anonymize and Translate buttons enabled, Search disabled

TC-S5-012-02.description: Select PDF document, verify Translate and Search enabled, Anonymize disabled

TC-S5-012-03.description: Select EML document, verify only Translate enabled, all others disabled

TC-S5-012-04.description: Hover over disabled button, verify tooltip explains why disabled

TC-S5-012-05.description: Select TXT document, verify all buttons enabled

TC-S5-012-06.description: Type '/anonymize' on PDF, verify AI responds 'Anonymization not supported for PDFs'

TC-S5-012-07.description: Click disabled Search button on image, verify no action triggered

TC-S5-012-08.description: Type '/search what is the passport number' on PDF, verify search executes successfully

TC-S5-012-09.description: Select image, verify can anonymize and translate but not search

TC-S5-012-10.description: Backend receives /search request for JPG, verify returns error response

TC-S5-012-11.description: Disabled button has visual indication (gray, opacity reduced)

TC-S5-012-12.description: Document with unknown type, verify all buttons disabled with 'Unsupported type' tooltip

TC-S5-012-13.description: Ask AI 'Can I anonymize this PDF?', verify AI responds 'No, only images can be anonymized'

TC-S5-012-14.description: Switch from PDF to JPG, verify toolbar button states update dynamically
